query: SELECT * FROM store_locations; SELECT k.id, k.orderNumber, k.outletId as kot_outlet, o.outletId as order_outlet, o.orderType FROM kot_queue k JOIN orders o ON k.orderNumber = o.orderNumber WHERE k.orderNumber IN ('00133', '00134');
